mnemonics: I Can Tell People I Need Help
keyPoints: Create a socket using socket() function
Define the address family using AF_INET for IPv4
Define the socket type using SOCK_STREAM for TCP
Use bind() method to associate the socket with the address
Use listen() method to set the maximum number of pending connections
Use accept() method to create a new socket for each incoming connection
Use send() and recv() methods to send and receive data
